text:
Ladies and gentlemen, introducing Riz, THE Singapore Superfan. He proved his 

superfandom by shaving his head and painting his face with SG icons, then beat his 

fellow superfan in a 3-challenge showdown. He is a legend🫡

Check out his super itinerary on your next visit 🇸🇬 And stay tuned for more from 

#SingaporeSuperfans 

1 Stay at a national monument - The Fullerton Hotel.

2 Surf, skate and ski at Trifecta.

3 Sample scoops and shoot selfies at Museum of Ice Cream.

4 Make Meme-mories at Merlion Park.

5 Explore Buddha Tooth Relic Temple.

6 Find feathery friends at Bird Paradise.

7 Feast at The Malayan Council.

8 Marvel at an indoor waterfall at Gardens by the Bay.

9 Go forest bathing at the Singapore Botanic Gardens.

10 Immerse yourself in culture and history at National Museum of Singapore.

11 Shop local at Design Orchard.

@trifecta.singapore @museumoficecreamsg @mandaiwildlifereserve 

@themalayancouncil.sg @gardensbythebay @natmuseum_sg

text:
With ScootPlus, a little extra comfort goes a long way. Think spacious leather seats, WiFi to stay connected, priority boarding and greater baggage allowance. Plus, for flights above 11 hours, enjoy two meals to keep you satisfied and a blanket for that extra cozy vibes. 

Ready to elevate your journey? Book ScootPlus today!
